... / Survival Craft

Survival Craft

Survival Craft is a sandbox game where the player crafts tools such as an axe and a shovel, weapons and even wearables in order to survive in the jungle. Gather the necessary materials to craft any item. Do not forget to construct buildings for yourself to take shelter. Create an environment for yourself where you can survive under the harsh conditions of raw nature!

Play Survival Craft Online

Loading game...
About Survival Craft

Survival Craft is a sandbox game where the player crafts tools such as an axe and a shovel, weapons and even wearables in order to survive in the jungle. Gather the necessary materials to craft any item. Do not forget to construct buildings for yourself to take shelter. Create an environment for yourself where you can survive under the harsh conditions of raw nature! This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Survival Craft in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Adventure game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Survival Craft for free?

Yes. Survival Craft is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Survival Craft?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
